title: STONEBORN Tooltips
body:
# STONEBORN Tooltips

Redesigns tooltips to be in the style of [STONEBORN](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stoneborn) by [Sindavar](https://modrinth.com/user/Sindavar)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/emhIvBGl/images/da362221a0ade88640c79ebd638a6887bf6c869f.png)

*No textures in this pack are from the original STONEBORN project. All of them are made by me.*
